label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question and the text. The question is about a search group formed by some American scientists. The options are A, B, C, or D. I need to find what they did according to the text. In the text, it says: "In 1975, however, some American scientists formed a search group. They used an underwater camera. It took pictures every seventy seconds. Some of the pictures seemed to show a red-brown creature. Its body was about four meters long and had a very ugly head on the end of a four meter neck. Many people then began to believe in the monster. But even today we can not be certain." So the American scientists used an underwater camera and took some pictures. The pictures seemed to show a creature that looked like a monster. So the correct choice is D: took some pictures which seemed to show a monster. Let me check the other options again. A: found the monster itself. The text does not say they found the monster, only that some pictures seemed to show a creature. So A is not correct. B: found a huge cave under water. The text mentions that underwater cameras found a huge underwater cave in a previous part (before 1975), not the American scientists. So B is not correct. C: believed that there wasn't
